title: Fireworks 2.0
description: After a year of mining, building and exploring, it's time to enjoy the rewards. Experience Minecraft with dates, calendars and a dynamic passage of time that makes every day matter.
body:
![A dark-purple gradient background with orange stars and strokes on the base and chief of the image, containing a stylized text that spells "Fireworks" in the center.](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/fireworks/AR5x2%20Banner%20-%20General.png?raw=true)

The purpose of Fireworks

Have you ever asked yourself how long is an in-game day, or even what day is it? Well, **no one ever did.** Every day is the exact same: you build, mine and explore when the sun is out and probably sleep to skip every night.
**Doesn't it feel repetitive...?**
---

A resourceful set of features

Fireworks is here to change your perception about the game by, with few features, let you organize a daily routine, schedule events in your world and bring changes that stay forever.

![Two green panels situated side-by-side. The left one contains the word "Clock" situated in the center, And the right one contains the word "Calendar" situated in the center.](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/fireworks/Panel%201%20-%20Landing%20Page.png?raw=true)
Know when your shift is off with the Clock, which can be customized through resourcepacks: Supporting 12-hour and 24-hour formats, and AM/PM indicator. Never forget your friend's birthday with the Calendar, that displays that date, month and year of your world. Supporting leap-years and month lengths ranging from 28 to 31 days.

New Year's Eve

You mined every ore, explored every biome, killed every enemy throughout the year and now it's time to rest. Is there anything better than enjoying what we can offer to you?

![A green-background panel, with an image of firework explosions cutting through the panel. The text on the right of the panel says "Behold a colorful spectacle".](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/fireworks/Panel%202%20-%20Landing%20Page.png?raw=true)
Admire an outstanding event full of colorful
explosions in the skies during New Year's Eve
Get emotional with an amazing
musical experience in New Year's Eve.
Prep up yourself before the
celebration so you can enjoy it no-rush.
---

Time is in your hands

Organize a routine, schedule tasks and plan adventures in your world.

![A yellowish-background panel containing text that says "Organize events with your friends"](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/fireworks/Panel%203%20-%20Landing%20Page.png?raw=true)

Stop just playing and starting living the game.
Gather your family, friends, partners and enjoy the time together.

![A yellowish background panel, with an image of a couple looking at the sunset cutting through the panel. The text on the left of the panel spells "Watch the sunset together".](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/fireworks/Panel%204%20-%20Landing%20Page.png?raw=true) ---

Get Fireworks now!

![A blue-background panel containing text that says "Install Fireworks Wherever. Whenever"](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/fireworks/Panel%205%20-%20Landing%20Page.png?raw=true)

Fireworks can be installed anywhere, either in pre-exising worlds or newly created ones, and used in any circumstance, be it singleplayer or multiplayer, survival, roleplaying, adventure maps. Anywhere.

[![Two blue panels situated side-by-side. The left one contains text that says "Translated with Crowdin" situated in the center, and the right one contains the text that says "Customizable Display" situated in the center.](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/fireworks/Panel%206%20-%20Landing%20Page.png?raw=true)](https://crowdin.com/project/fireworks-from-choir)

Help translating Fireworks at Crowdin
Customize display format using resourcepacks
Change display placement in the settings.

![A white panel with text that that says "Presented by Choir"](https://github.com/ChoirStudios/ChoirStudios.github.io/blob/main/assets/foot_banner.png?raw=true)
